title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Angel One - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Angel One - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Angel One in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!
